views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing total recipe count, favorites count, cooking sessions, average rating, recently added recipes, and top-rated highlights with quick-add FAB

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Add or edit a recipe with structured fields: name, category, cuisine, difficulty, prep/cook time steppers, servings, ingredients text area, instructions text area, rating slider, favorite toggle, and optional calorie info

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Browsable recipe collection with search, filtering by category/cuisine/difficulty/favorites, sorted by date added or rating or times cooked

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Cooking analytics with cuisine distribution pie chart, difficulty breakdown bar chart, cooking frequency over time line chart, collection growth trend, time-profile analysis, and personalized insight cards

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total number of recipes saved in the collection

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalCookingSessions
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of timesCooked across all recipes

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageRating
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean rating across all recipes that have a rating > 0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: favoriteRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All recipes marked as favorite, sorted by rating descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: favoriteCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of recipes marked as favorite

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topRatedRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top 5 recipes by rating, breaking ties by timesCooked

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostCookedRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top 5 recipes sorted by timesCooked descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: cuisineDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Recipe count grouped by cuisine type, sorted descending for chart display

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Recipe count grouped by meal category, sorted descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: difficultyBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Recipe count by difficulty level: easy, medium, hard

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averagePrepTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean prep time in minutes across all recipes with prepTimeMinutes > 0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageCookTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean cook time in minutes across all recipes with cookTimeMinutes > 0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageTotalTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean total time (prepTimeMinutes + cookTimeMinutes) across all recipes

viewModelComputedProperties.name: recipesAddedThisWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of new recipes added in the current calendar week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weekOverWeekChange
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change in recipes added this week vs previous week; positive = growth

viewModelComputedProperties.name: uniqueCuisinesExplored
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of distinct cuisine types represented in the collection

viewModelComputedProperties.name: quickRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Recipes with total time (prep + cook) under 30 minutes, sorted by total time ascending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyNewRecipesGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of weekly goal met (recipesAddedThisWeek / weeklyGoal), clamped to 0...1

viewModelComputedProperties.name: collectionInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Generated text insights: cuisine affinity, time profile, difficulty progression, underrepresented categories, most reliable recipe

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyRecipeChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Recipes added per month for the last 6 months, formatted as (monthLabel, count) for line/bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: cookingStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one new recipe added or timesCooked incremented on any recipe

dailyGoal.description: Weekly recipe collection target — encourages building a diverse personal cookbook and actually cooking from it

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if the user added a new recipe OR incremented timesCooked on any existing recipe. Consecutive active days form the streak. Streak resets to 0 after one inactive day.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track 3 core trends: (1) Collection growth — weekly new recipes added vs previous week as percentage change. (2) Cuisine diversity index — number of unique cuisines / total cuisine types, flagging if user is stuck in 1-2 cuisines. (3) Difficulty progression — ratio of medium+hard recipes in last 30 days vs first 30 days, detecting if user is challenging themselves more over time.
insights: Cuisine affinity — identify top 2 cuisines by count and their percentage of total collection (e.g., 'Italian dominates at 35% — try exploring Thai or Korean!')
Time profile — classify user as Quick Cook (<30min avg total), Moderate (30-60min), or Ambitious Chef (>60min) based on average prepTime + cookTime
Difficulty progression — compare difficulty distribution of last 10 recipes vs first 10 to detect skill growth
Collection completeness — identify meal categories with zero or fewer than 2 recipes and suggest filling gaps
Most reliable recipe — recipe with highest combination score of (rating * 0.6 + normalized_timesCooked * 0.4)
Cooking velocity — trend of timesCooked sum per week over last 4 weeks, flagging increase or decrease
Under-cooked gems — recipes rated 4+ stars but with timesCooked == 0, suggesting user should try them
Calorie awareness — average caloriesPerServing across tracked recipes, comparison by category
